phase_name: lz-refactor coach-quality improvement loop (post Phase-12 e2e)
supersedes: The prior Phase-12 HANDOFF.json (2026-07-11) and .planning/phases/12-*/.continue-here.md are STALE. This session executed all of Phase-12's e2e proof and pivoted into a skill-improvement loop. THIS is the active state.

completed_tasks.name: Ran full Phase-12 e2e (nx smoke, kata after, pre-edit baselines, OLD-OLD ladder, natural-trigger ladder, tight-4 fleet). FINDING: null skill value-delta vs base Opus at every scope/gap; auto-trigger is the only skill-attributable win.
Quick task 260712-i5y: package-scope directive eval p8/gr4 live-vs-no_skill + multi-aspect (blind quality judge = parity; efficiency = skill +66% cost). Null delta.
Quick task 260712-n5o: methodical-adherence research + nx fleet p9-p12 (null delta generalizes; with_skill auto-trigger 8/8).

Skill improvement v1: revert 12-02 + E1-E8 veto + blast-radius guard + lean sweep. Gated + committed + reloaded + re-measured -> veto STILL failed 1/3 kata over-engineering (run-1 built a 5-class ItemUpdater hierarchy, gamed 'duplication across 2 blocks').

Research: general warrant (net-cost inequality) + enforcement (neutral+skeptic) + review-regimes. Verdict: verifiability is the dominant binding lever; same-model taste-reviewer NOT sound (shared blind spots); countable rubric is the move; reviewer/hook only measurement-gated; sound escalation = deterministic-count or CROSS-FAMILY, not same-model review.

L1: rewrote step-4 warrant to ONE countable net-cost test (removes duplication-sites/obscurity vs adds classes/types/files/indirection; APPLY only if removed>added). Branch-double-counting loophole closed per unbiased review. Gated: review PASS + humanizer. Committed, review-clean.

remaining_tasks.name: RE-MEASURE L1: improved with_skill on kata gr4 (over-engineering testbed) + a SECOND pattern-tempting probe (test generalization, not re-fit kata), k=3, apply, --force. REUSE existing no_skill baselines (base unchanged; do NOT re-run no_skill). Grade: does the countable warrant DECLINE the over-build (target 0/3 hierarchy vs prior 1/3)?

If residual over-engineering still matters: escalate to a DETERMINISTIC structure-count check or CROSS-FAMILY reviewer (NOT same-model taste-reviewer -- research-disqualified). Else accept auto-trigger + L1, record findings.

OPTIONAL untested value lever: build + run the REFERENCE use-case eval (on-demand 'explain refactoring/Direction/de-patterning' with_skill vs no_skill, recommend mode, no repo) -- where a curated oracle-verified catalog could beat base recall. Cheap.

Cleanup (deferred; needs user OK for destructive git): restore nx (origin/23.0.x) + kata (main) to pristine + drop throwaway branches + stashes; remove lz-plugins-baseline + lz-plugins-oldold worktrees; commit or discard deferred eval results/ (16 untracked trees + _archive_12-02/).

blockers.description: Metered claude -p runs are user-gated + session-limit-fragile (hit the cap ~5x this session). Idempotent resume fills gaps.
blockers.workaround: Re-invoke the runner; exit-1 metas re-run, exit-0 skip. Use --force for improved with_skill (else it returns OLD-skill results).

blockers.description: /reload-plugins is user-only, but the e2e runner reads the skill from --plugin-dir (repo tree on disk) = committed L1, so the re-measure runner uses L1 WITHOUT a reload.
blockers.workaround: L1 committed (98cf482); runner picks it up. Reload only for interactive.

blockers.description: git reset --hard on nx/kata is classifier-gated (needs the user to name the target). Only for cleanup.
blockers.workaround: Ask user to authorize, or use git stash.

human_actions_pending.action: Authorize + pace the metered re-measure runs (kata gr4 + 2nd probe, k=3 with_skill).
human_actions_pending.context: User asked to hand the RUNS to a fresh session.

decisions.decision: L1 = one countable net-cost warrant, refactoring-agnostic (not per-pattern rules).
decisions.rationale: Verifiability is the dominant binding lever; a countable added-vs-removed test generalizes and subsumes polymorphism.

decisions.decision: Do NOT build a same-model reviewer-agent (L2) or hook (L3) now.
decisions.rationale: Unbiased research reversed the earlier (primed) pro-agent conclusion: same-model review shares blind spots on TASTE; ROI unjustified for infrequent failures; escalation, if needed, is deterministic-count or cross-family.

decisions.decision: Reuse existing no_skill baselines; only re-run improved with_skill (--force).
decisions.rationale: Prompts unchanged + no_skill loads no plugin -> base identical.

decisions.decision: Honest finding: base Opus 4.8@high is excellent; the skill's realizable value = auto-trigger (proven) + reference catalog (UNTESTED).
decisions.rationale: 6+ e2e scenarios show null coach-output delta; output-gating to beat a strong base is not worth the machinery.

uncommitted_files: .claude/skills/lz-refactor-workspace/**/results/ (16 untracked eval result trees incl. _archive_12-02/; deferred evidence)
next_action: Read .planning/.continue-here.md fully (it has the exact re-measure commands + grading rubric). Then run improved with_skill on kata gr4 + a 2nd pattern-tempting probe, k=3, --force; grade over-engineering (0/3 target). Do NOT re-run no_skill.
context_notes: Arc: Phase-12 e2e proved the skill adds no measurable coach-output value over base Opus (only auto-trigger). We tried to MAKE it outperform via the over-engineering veto. Iteration 1 (per-case veto) failed 1/3 (kata hierarchy). L1 (countable net-cost warrant) is iteration 2 -- review-clean, committed (98cf482), UN-measured. The re-measure decides whether L1 binds; if not, escalate to deterministic-count/cross-family (NOT same-model review). The reference-catalog use case is the untested value lever if output-gating stays null. Grade from meta/diff/transcript, never used_refactor; the kata .snap Conjured lines are the golden master, not added behavior.
